message:
test(fcp-sdk): expand retry, error handling, and schema test coverage

- retry_integration_tests.rs: add integration tests for retry policies
  under real async conditions (timeouts, backoff, jitter).
- retry_policy_tests.rs: add unit tests for retry policy configuration
  validation and boundary conditions.
- sdk_error_tests.rs: expand error type coverage including conversion
  tests and error chain preservation.
- sdk_schema_tests.rs: add schema validation tests ensuring SDK types
  serialize/deserialize correctly across versions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
